title: Mealy + Moore emit points
manager: Both classic emit disciplines: Mealy outputs (emitted on a transition edge, depending on the input) and Moore outputs (emitted on state entry, depending only on the state). Supporting both means FSL can model the full range of finite-state-machine output styles from the textbooks directly, instead of forcing every design into one convention and making the other awkward to express.
cs: Mealy (edge) + Moore (entry) emit points (§14); both lower to the transactional emit (W7.3); the output-timing choice is per-emission.
